completion_checks.name: builder_reviewer_flow_connection
confirmed_facts: session-39 defined the canonical builder-to-reviewer flow
session-39 defined a structured pass format

completion_checks.interpretation: The builder and reviewer components are now connected as a complete docs-only operational flow.

evidence_summary.builder_outcome: Phase9 established the minimum builder layer for transforming minimal human input into structured spec drafts.
evidence_summary.reviewer_outcome: Phase9 established the minimum reviewer layer for pass or reject judgment with structured outputs.
evidence_summary.flow_outcome: Phase9 connected the builder and reviewer into a canonical human-supervised flow.
evidence_summary.overall_assessment: Phase9 achieved the intended goal of introducing the generation layer as a docs-only operating model.

risks: The builder-to-reviewer flow has not yet been validated through a real project trial.
The reviewer categories may require refinement after the first practical use.
The generation layer is still manual and not integrated into runtime execution.

final_judgement.reason: Phase9 completed the intended scope of generation-layer introduction by establishing the minimum builder layer, minimum reviewer layer, and canonical builder-to-reviewer flow without requiring runtime integration.
